title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
